legislation_refs.name: TAKE IT DOWN Act
legislation_refs.context: To require covered platforms to remove nonconsensual intimate visual depictions, and for other purposes

legislation_refs.name: Tools to Address Known Exploitation by Immobilizing Technological Deepfakes on Websites and Networks Act
legislation_refs.context: This Act may be cited as the "Tools to Address Known Exploitation by Immobilizing Technological Deepfakes on Websites and Networks Act" or the "TAKE IT DOWN Act".

legislation_refs.name: Communications Act of 1934
legislation_refs.context: Section 223 of the Communications Act of 1934 (47 U.S.C. 223) is amended

legislation_refs.name: Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2022
legislation_refs.context: intimate visual depiction has the meaning given such term in section 1309 of the Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2022

legislation_refs.name: Controlled Substances Act
legislation_refs.context: Section 413 of the Controlled Substances Act (21 U.S.C. 853), with the exception of subsections (a) and (d), shall apply

legislation_refs.name: Title 18, United States Code, Section 2256
legislation_refs.context: child pornography (as that term is defined in section 2256 of title 18, United States Code)

legislation_refs.name: Title 18, United States Code, Section 1466A
legislation_refs.context: visual depiction described in subsection (a) or (b) of section 1466A of title 18, United States Code

legislation_refs.name: Title 18, United States Code, Section 2264
legislation_refs.context: The court shall order restitution for an offense under paragraph (2) or (3) in the same manner as under section 2264 of title 18

legislation_refs.name: Title 18, United States Code, Section 2252
legislation_refs.context: Nothing in this subsection shall be construed to limit the application of any other relevant law, including section 2252 of title 18

legislation_refs.name: Federal Trade Commission Act
legislation_refs.context: violation of a rule defining an unfair or a deceptive act or practice under section 18(a)(1)(B) of the Federal Trade Commission Act

legislation_refs.name: Code of Federal Regulations, Title 47
legislation_refs.context: provider of broadband internet access service (as described in section 8.1(b) of title 47, Code of Federal Regulations)

disambiguation_rules.commission: Explicitly defined as Federal Trade Commission in SEC. 4(1) of TAKE IT DOWN Act
